preconditions: I can only initialize a release A if it is not the case that A has been initialized and it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I initialize a release A, it is the case that A has been initialized

assign_release_to_wave.description: assign a release A to a promotion wave B
preconditions: I can only assign a release A to a promotion wave B if it is the case that A has been initialized and B is available and A is allowed in promotion wave B
I can only assign a release A to a promotion wave B if it is not the case that A is assigned
effects: Once I assign a release A to a promotion wave B, it is the case that A is assigned to promotion wave B and A is assigned
Once I assign a release A to a promotion wave B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_release_from_wave.description: unassign a release A from a promotion wave B
preconditions: I can only unassign a release A from a promotion wave B if it is the case that A is assigned to promotion wave B
I can only unassign a release A from a promotion wave B if it is not the case that primary validation passed for A and it is not the case that composite validation passed for A
effects: Once I unassign a release A from a promotion wave B, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign a release A from a promotion wave B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to promotion wave B and it is not the case anymore that A is assigned and it is not the case anymore that the target for A is ready and it is not the case anymore that validation for A has passed and it is not the case anymore that the approval for A has been recorded and it is not the case anymore that promotion is permitted for A and it is not the case anymore that A has additional checks

bind_release_to_target_group.description: bind a release A to a deployment target group B
preconditions: I can only bind a release A to a deployment target group B if it is the case that A has been initialized and B is available
effects: Once I bind a release A to a deployment target group B, it is the case that A is bound to the release target group B
Once I bind a release A to a deployment target group B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_release_from_target_group.description: unbind a release A from a deployment target group B
preconditions: I can only unbind a release A from a deployment target group B if it is the case that A is bound to the release target group B
effects: Once I unbind a release A from a deployment target group B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a release A from a deployment target group B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the release target group B

mark_target_ready.description: mark target for a release A as ready in a deployment target group B
preconditions: I can only mark target for a release A as ready in a deployment target group B if it is the case that A has been initialized and A is assigned and A is bound to the release target group B
I can only mark target for a release A as ready in a deployment target group B if it is not the case that the target for A is ready
effects: Once I mark target for a release A as ready in a deployment target group B, it is the case that the target for A is ready

record_approval_and_mark_target.description: record approval for a release A with an approval token B and mark target as ready
preconditions: I can only record approval for a release A with an approval token B and mark target as ready if it is the case that A has been initialized and A is assigned and B is available
I can only record approval for a release A with an approval token B and mark target as ready if it is not the case that the target for A is ready
effects: Once I record approval for a release A with an approval token B and mark target as ready, it is the case that the target for A is ready and the approval for A has been recorded
Once I record approval for a release A with an approval token B and mark target as ready, it is not the case anymore that B is available

run_orchestration_validation_on_target.description: run orchestration validation on target for a release A using a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C
preconditions: I can only run orchestration validation on target for a release A using a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C if it is the case that the target for A is ready and A is assigned and A is bound to the release target group B and C is available
I can only run orchestration validation on target for a release A using a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C if it is not the case that validation for A has passed
effects: Once I run orchestration validation on target for a release A using a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C, it is the case that validation for A has passed
Once I run orchestration validation on target for a release A using a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C, it is not the case anymore that the approval for A has been recorded

run_strategy_validation.description: run strategy validation for a release A using a rollout strategy B
preconditions: I can only run strategy validation for a release A using a rollout strategy B if it is the case that A is assigned and the rollout strategy B is activated for A
I can only run strategy validation for a release A using a rollout strategy B if it is not the case that validation for A has passed
effects: Once I run strategy validation for a release A using a rollout strategy B, it is the case that validation for A has passed
Once I run strategy validation for a release A using a rollout strategy B, it is not the case anymore that the approval for A has been recorded

attach_canary_group.description: attach a canary group B to a release A
preconditions: I can only attach a canary group B to a release A if it is the case that A has been initialized and B is available and A is allowed in the canary group B
effects: Once I attach a canary group B to a release A, it is the case that B is attached to A
Once I attach a canary group B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_canary_group.description: detach a canary group B from a release A
preconditions: I can only detach a canary group B from a release A if it is the case that B is attached to A
effects: Once I detach a canary group B from a release A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a canary group B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is attached to A

attach_dependency_service.description: attach a dependency service B to a release A
preconditions: I can only attach a dependency service B to a release A if it is the case that A has been initialized and B is available and A is allowed for the dependency service B
effects: Once I attach a dependency service B to a release A, it is the case that B is attached to A
Once I attach a dependency service B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_dependency_service.description: detach a dependency service B from a release A
preconditions: I can only detach a dependency service B from a release A if it is the case that B is attached to A
effects: Once I detach a dependency service B from a release A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a dependency service B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is attached to A

attach_observability_metric.description: attach an observability metric B to a release A
preconditions: I can only attach an observability metric B to a release A if it is the case that A has been initialized and B is available and A is allowed for the observability metric B
effects: Once I attach an observability metric B to a release A, it is the case that B is attached to A
Once I attach an observability metric B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_observability_metric.description: detach an observability metric B from a release A
preconditions: I can only detach an observability metric B from a release A if it is the case that B is attached to A
effects: Once I detach an observability metric B from a release A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach an observability metric B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is attached to A

attach_configuration_set.description: attach a configuration set B to a release A
preconditions: I can only attach a configuration set B to a release A if it is the case that A has been initialized and B is available and A is allowed for the configuration set B
effects: Once I attach a configuration set B to a release A, it is the case that B is attached to A
Once I attach a configuration set B to a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_configuration_set.description: detach a configuration set B from a release A
preconditions: I can only detach a configuration set B from a release A if it is the case that B is attached to A
effects: Once I detach a configuration set B from a release A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a configuration set B from a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is attached to A

validate_environment_integration.description: validate integration of a release A in an environment B with a canary group C and a dependency service D
preconditions: I can only validate integration of a release A in an environment B with a canary group C and a dependency service D if it is the case that A is assigned and C is attached to A and D is attached to A and B is available and A is allowed in the environment B
I can only validate integration of a release A in an environment B with a canary group C and a dependency service D if it is not the case that primary validation passed for A
effects: Once I validate integration of a release A in an environment B with a canary group C and a dependency service D, it is the case that B is validated for A and primary validation passed for A
Once I validate integration of a release A in an environment B with a canary group C and a dependency service D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

validate_environment_with_metrics_and_ro.description: validate a release A in an environment B using an observability metric C with a rollback plan D
preconditions: I can only validate a release A in an environment B using an observability metric C with a rollback plan D if it is the case that A is assigned and C is attached to A and D is available and B is available and A is allowed in the environment B and A is allowed for the rollback plan D
I can only validate a release A in an environment B using an observability metric C with a rollback plan D if it is not the case that primary validation passed for A
effects: Once I validate a release A in an environment B using an observability metric C with a rollback plan D, it is the case that B is validated for A and primary validation passed for A and A has additional checks and the approval for A has been recorded

Once I validate a release A in an environment B using an observability metric C with a rollback plan D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_additional_checks.description: clear additional checks for a release A with a canary group B and a dependency service C
preconditions: I can only clear additional checks for a release A with a canary group B and a dependency service C if it is the case that primary validation passed for A and A has additional checks and B is attached to A and C is attached to A
effects: Once I clear additional checks for a release A with a canary group B and a dependency service C, it is not the case anymore that A has additional checks and it is not the case anymore that the approval for A has been recorded

approve_promotion_via_policy_variant_a.description: approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant a policy variant a D with a canary group B and a dependency service C
preconditions: I can only approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant a policy variant a D with a canary group B and a dependency service C if it is the case that validation for A has passed and primary validation passed for A and B is attached to A and C is attached to A and A is bound to the policy D

I can only approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant a policy variant a D with a canary group B and a dependency service C if it is not the case that the approval for A has been recorded and it is not the case that composite validation passed for A
effects: Once I approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant a policy variant a D with a canary group B and a dependency service C, it is the case that composite validation passed for A

approve_promotion_via_policy_variant_b.description: approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant b D with an observability metric B and a configuration set C
preconditions: I can only approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant b D with an observability metric B and a configuration set C if it is the case that validation for A has passed and primary validation passed for A and B is attached to A and C is attached to A and A is bound to the policy D
I can only approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant b D with an observability metric B and a configuration set C if it is not the case that composite validation passed for A
effects: Once I approve promotion for a release A via a policy variant b D with an observability metric B and a configuration set C, it is the case that composite validation passed for A and the approval for A has been recorded

record_promotion_permission.description: record promotion permission for a release A with a canary group B and a dependency service C
preconditions: I can only record promotion permission for a release A with a canary group B and a dependency service C if it is the case that composite validation passed for A and the approval for A has been recorded and B is attached to A and C is attached to A
effects: Once I record promotion permission for a release A with a canary group B and a dependency service C, it is the case that promotion is permitted for A

Once I record promotion permission for a release A with a canary group B and a dependency service C, it is not the case anymore that the approval for A has been recorded and it is not the case anymore that validation for A has passed and it is not the case anymore that A has additional checks

revalidate_target_after_permission.description: revalidate target for a release A with a deployment target group B using an orchestration job C after permission
preconditions: I can only revalidate target for a release A with a deployment target group B using an orchestration job C after permission if it is the case that promotion is permitted for A and composite validation passed for A and A is assigned and A is bound to the release target group B and C is available
I can only revalidate target for a release A with a deployment target group B using an orchestration job C after permission if it is not the case that validation for A has passed
effects: Once I revalidate target for a release A with a deployment target group B using an orchestration job C after permission, it is the case that validation for A has passed

confirm_target_approval_binding.description: confirm target approval binding for a release A with a deployment target group B
preconditions: I can only confirm target approval binding for a release A with a deployment target group B if it is the case that composite validation passed for A and validation for A has passed and A is bound to the release target group B

I can only confirm target approval binding for a release A with a deployment target group B if it is not the case that the approval for A has been recorded and it is not the case that target approval granted for A
effects: Once I confirm target approval binding for a release A with a deployment target group B, it is the case that target approval granted for A

consume_approval_token_for_target.description: consume approval token an approval token B for a release A
preconditions: I can only consume approval token an approval token B for a release A if it is the case that composite validation passed for A and validation for A has passed and B is available
I can only consume approval token an approval token B for a release A if it is not the case that the approval for A has been recorded and it is not the case that target approval granted for A
effects: Once I consume approval token an approval token B for a release A, it is the case that target approval granted for A
Once I consume approval token an approval token B for a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

engage_rollout_strategy_for_release.description: engage rollout strategy a rollout strategy B for a release A
preconditions: I can only engage rollout strategy a rollout strategy B for a release A if it is the case that target approval granted for A and B is available and A profiles a strategy link with B
effects: Once I engage rollout strategy a rollout strategy B for a release A, it is the case that A is engaged with the rollout strategy B
Once I engage rollout strategy a rollout strategy B for a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

activate_strategy_for_profile_b_from_pro.description: activate strategy a rollout strategy C for a release profile b A from a release profile a release profile a B
preconditions: I can only activate strategy a rollout strategy C for a release profile b A from a release profile a release profile a B if it is the case that A has been initialized and A is profile b and A is linked to the profile b strategy C and B is engaged with the rollout strategy C
I can only activate strategy a rollout strategy C for a release profile b A from a release profile a release profile a B if it is not the case that the rollout strategy C is activated for A
effects: Once I activate strategy a rollout strategy C for a release profile b A from a release profile a release profile a B, it is the case that the rollout strategy C is activated for A

mark_release_ready_for_finalization.description: mark a release A ready for finalization with a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C
preconditions: I can only mark a release A ready for finalization with a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C if it is the case that A has been initialized and A is profile b and validation for A has passed and target approval granted for A and A is bound to the release target group B and C is available
I can only mark a release A ready for finalization with a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C if it is not the case that A is ready for finalization
effects: Once I mark a release A ready for finalization with a deployment target group B and an orchestration job C, it is the case that A is ready for finalization

preconditions: I can only finalize a release A if it is the case that A is profile a and A has been initialized and A is assigned and primary validation passed for A and composite validation passed for A and target approval granted for A and validation for A has passed
I can only finalize a release A if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize a release A, it is the case that A has been finalized

finalize_release_with_strategy.description: finalize a release A with a rollout strategy B
preconditions: I can only finalize a release A with a rollout strategy B if it is the case that A is profile b and A has been initialized and A is assigned and primary validation passed for A and composite validation passed for A and target approval granted for A and validation for A has passed and the rollout strategy B is activated for A
I can only finalize a release A with a rollout strategy B if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize a release A with a rollout strategy B, it is the case that A has been finalized

finalize_release_with_profile_signal.description: finalize a release A with profile signal
preconditions: I can only finalize a release A with profile signal if it is the case that A is profile b and A has been initialized and A is assigned and primary validation passed for A and composite validation passed for A and target approval granted for A and validation for A has passed and A is ready for finalization
I can only finalize a release A with profile signal if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize a release A with profile signal, it is the case that A has been finalized

action_nl_templates_indef.run_strategy_validation: run strategy validation for a release {?release} using a rollout strategy {?rollout_strategy}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_canary_group: attach a canary group {?canary_group} to a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_canary_group: detach a canary group {?canary_group} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_dependency_service: attach a dependency service {?dependency_service} to a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_dependency_service: detach a dependency service {?dependency_service} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_observability_metric: attach an observability metric {?observability_metric} to a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_observability_metric: detach an observability metric {?observability_metric} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_configuration_set: attach a configuration set {?configuration_set} to a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_configuration_set: detach a configuration set {?configuration_set} from a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_environment_integration: validate integration of a release {?release} in an environment {?environment} with a canary group {?canary_group} and a dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_environment_with_metrics_and_ro: validate a release {?release} in an environment {?environment} using an observability metric {?observability_metric} with a rollback plan {?rollback_plan}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_additional_checks: clear additional checks for a release {?release} with a canary group {?canary_group} and a dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_promotion_via_policy_variant_a: approve promotion for a release {?release} via a policy variant a policy variant a {?policy_variant_a} with a canary group {?canary_group} and a dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_promotion_via_policy_variant_b: approve promotion for a release {?release} via a policy variant b {?policy_variant_b} with an observability metric {?observability_metric} and a configuration set {?configuration_set}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_promotion_permission: record promotion permission for a release {?release} with a canary group {?canary_group} and a dependency service {?dependency_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.revalidate_target_after_permission: revalidate target for a release {?release} with a deployment target group {?deployment_target_group} using an orchestration job {?orchestration_job} after permission
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_target_approval_binding: confirm target approval binding for a release {?release} with a deployment target group {?deployment_target_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.consume_approval_token_for_target: consume approval token an approval token {?approval_token} for a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.engage_rollout_strategy_for_release: engage rollout strategy a rollout strategy {?rollout_strategy} for a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.activate_strategy_for_profile_b_from_pro: activate strategy a rollout strategy {?rollout_strategy} for a release profile b {?release_profile_b} from a release profile a release profile a {?release_profile_a}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_release_ready_for_finalization: mark a release {?release} ready for finalization with a deployment target group {?deployment_target_group} and an orchestration job {?orchestration_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_with_strategy: finalize a release {?release} with a rollout strategy {?rollout_strategy}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_with_profile_signal: finalize a release {?release} with profile signal

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a release or a promotion wave or a environment or a dependency service or a canary group or a observability metric or a deployment target group or a approval token or a rollout strategy or a orchestration job or a rollback plan or a configuration set or a policy is also a object
Everything that is a policy variant a or a policy variant b is also a policy
Everything that is a release profile a or a release profile b is also a release
